name: Conformance Declaration Response
abstract: This building block corresponds to the conformance declaration response from OGC API - Common - Part 1: Core
annotatedSchema:
description: 'The URIs of all conformance classes supported by the server.


  To support "generic" clients that want to access multiple

  OGC API implementations - and not "just" a specific

  API / server, the server declares the conformance

  classes it implements and conforms to.'
content:
  application/json:
    schema:
      $ref: https://geolabs.github.io/bblocks-ogcapi-common/build/annotated/api/common/v1/schemas/confClasses/schema.yaml
    example:
      conformsTo:
      - http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/conf/core
      - http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/conf/landingPage
      - http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/conf/oas30
      - http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/conf/html
      - http://www.opengis.net/spec/ogcapi-common-1/1.0/conf/json
  text/html:
    schema:
      type: string
